worship.guide: WORSHIP / GOSPEL. Lyrics MUST be about praise, faith, and grace. Use simple, uplifting language.

characters: A weary believer seeking rest
Someone returning to faith
A grateful person praying
A congregation singing together
settings: in a quiet church at dawn
looking up at a starry sky
kneeling in the dark
standing on a mountain top
conflicts: surrendering control
finding peace in hard times
trusting a hidden plan
holding onto faith

rnb.guide: R&B / SOUL. Lyrics MUST feel intimate and vulnerable. Themes: deep love, longing, heartbreak. Use smooth language.

characters: A heartbroken lover who can't move on
Someone waiting up late for a text
Two exes meeting unexpectedly
Someone who fears vulnerability
settings: in a dimly lit bedroom at 2 AM
driving through the city in the rain
sitting alone at a crowded lounge
dancing closely in a quiet kitchen
conflicts: missing a love that felt like home
letting go of someone still desired
falling back into old habits
craving emotional connection
objects_of_focus: an unread message on a screen

topics: Loving someone who won't let you in

reggae.guide: REGGAE. Lyrics MUST reflect unity, peace, love, and positive vibration. Use simple, laid-back phrasing.

characters: A wise community elder
Someone fighting for peace
A traveler returning to their roots
A youth choosing love over anger
settings: on a sunny beach with crashing waves
in a colorful street market
around a warm evening bonfire
in a yard where the community gathers
conflicts: choosing peace in hard times
rising above daily struggles
unifying people from different places
staying rooted in a fast world
objects_of_focus: the beating of an old drum
the roots of a giant tree

topics: Keeping faith when times are hard

slow_rock.guide: SLOW ROCK / BALLAD. Lyrics MUST be emotionally powerful. Themes: deep love, heartbreak, nostalgia, goodbye.
slow_rock.vocal_style: Powerful, raspy, emotional build-up, belting highs

characters: Someone walking away for the last time
A lonely traveler far from home
Someone trying to forgive a betrayal
A person reading old love letters
settings: on an empty highway at midnight
standing outside a closed front door
looking out at a thunderstorm
packing a suitcase in a silent room
conflicts: finding the strength to move on
saying a goodbye that changes everything
fighting for a failing relationship
watching a dream slip away
objects_of_focus: a cassette tape with a handwritten label

topics: Holding on to a slipping love
The road after the last goodbye
The beautiful pain of an ending

hiphop.guide: HIP HOP / RAP. Lyrics MUST have strong flow and storytelling. Themes: ambition, hustle, reality, confidence.

characters: An underdog working while others sleep
Someone who finally made it
A loyal friend from the neighborhood
An ambitious youth with nothing to lose
settings: on a city rooftop looking down
in a late-night recording studio
driving through the old neighborhood
under the glow of a streetlamp
conflicts: staying true to roots after success
proving the doubters wrong
carrying the weight of expectations
outgrowing friends who refuse to grow

jazz.guide: JAZZ / BLUES. Lyrics MUST have a poetic quality. Themes: late-night melancholy, bittersweet love, city life.

characters: A mysterious stranger sitting alone
A melancholic musician packing up
Two lovers sharing a final drink
An old soul reminiscing about the past
settings: in a dimly lit, smoky jazz club
walking down a street in the rain
on a balcony overlooking a sleepless city
in a classic diner at 3 AM
conflicts: loving someone who will never belong to you
the quiet beauty of an ending relationship
nostalgia for a life that could have been
the deep loneliness of a crowded city

topics: Last call at a place you love
An old song that explains everything

metal.guide: ROCK / METAL. Lyrics MUST feel raw and intense. Themes: rebellion, inner demons, anger, defiance.
metal.vocal_style: Harsh vocals, powerful clean belting, aggressive

characters: A rebel breaking away from the system
A tormented soul fighting inner thoughts
A survivor rising from the bottom
An outcast seeking truth
settings: in a crumbling warehouse
standing on the edge of a cliff
in the middle of a violent storm
in the center of a mosh pit
conflicts: breaking free from expectations
the internal war of the mind
screaming the truth to a deaf world
turning pain into power

topics: The rage that keeps you standing

rock.guide: ROCK / ALTERNATIVE. Lyrics MUST feel energetic and authentic. Themes: freedom, identity, love, and loss.

characters: A restless youth leaving their hometown
A wild spirit living for the weekend
Two outcasts against the world
Someone giving up a safe life for reality
settings: in a hot, cramped garage studio
driving a beat-up car down a highway
under the blinding lights of a stage
on the roof of a high school building
conflicts: choosing who you want to be
the tension of a chaotic relationship
refusing to settle for an ordinary life
surviving something meant to break you
objects_of_focus: a pair of torn denim jeans
a speeding ticket on the dashboard

topics: A night that felt like freedom
Choosing who you want to be

indie.guide: INDIE / FOLK. Lyrics MUST feel personal and introspective. Themes: everyday moments, nostalgia, quiet observations.

characters: Someone cleaning out their childhood bedroom
An insomniac watching the city lights
Two strangers sharing an umbrella
A traveler who lost their map
settings: in an empty 24-hour diner
sitting on the floor of an empty apartment
at a foggy train station at midnight
driving on a highway with no radio
conflicts: missing a version of yourself that is gone
learning to be okay with being alone
watching seasons change while feeling stuck
finding meaning in the ordinary
objects_of_focus: a dried flower pressed in a book
a potted plant that survived everything

topics: A season of life you can't explain

edm.guide: EDM / ELECTRONIC. Lyrics MUST be euphoric and simple. Themes: freedom, dancing, the night, unity. Use repetitive hooks.

characters: Someone dancing alone to forget worries
Two strangers locking eyes
A group of friends feeling invincible
A weekend raver living for the night
settings: in the center of a massive dancefloor
underneath sweeping laser lights
watching the sunrise after a long night out
at an open-air festival
conflicts: losing yourself completely in the music
wanting the moment to last forever
finding connection in a crowd
letting go of stress through movement

topics: A night that became a memory instantly

lofi.guide: LO-FI. SEMI-INSTRUMENTAL. Lyrics are SHORT (1 verse, 1 chorus). Themes: late nights studying, soft nostalgia, quiet focus.

characters: A student studying late into the night
Someone watching rain from a window
A person petting their sleeping cat
A night owl watching the city
settings: in a cozy bedroom lit by a desk lamp
in a quiet library
on a train seat watching the world blur
in a living room with vinyl spinning
conflicts: finding focus amidst thoughts
drifting between wakefulness and sleep
enjoying the sound of silence
the slow passage of a quiet day
objects_of_focus: a window fogged from the inside

topics: Studying with the rain on the window
The gap between tasks where you breathe
Watching a city from a quiet room

country.guide: COUNTRY. Lyrics MUST feel honest. Themes: home, family, heartbreak, open roads, small-town life. Use direct storytelling.

characters: A person driving back to their hometown
An old farmer looking at their land
Someone drinking away a broken heart
A grandfather telling a story
settings: driving a dusty truck down a dirt road
sitting on a wooden front porch
in a crowded local tavern
by a crackling campfire
conflicts: missing the simplicity of how things used to be
the pain of leaving home
a summer romance that ended too soon
choosing roots over city life

topics: A dog, a truck, and a broken heart
Coming home to find nothing the same

latin.guide: LATIN. Lyrics MUST be passionate. Themes: love, desire, celebration, dance, the beauty of life.

characters: Two passionate dancers moving together
A romantic singing outside a window
A family celebrating a reunion
A mysterious stranger met on vacation
settings: in a crowded Havana nightclub
on a warm beach at sunset
in a lively town plaza full of musicians
at a family party where everyone dances
conflicts: a love so intense it feels dangerous
the pure joy of celebrating life
the rhythm taking control of the body
a romance that only lasts for the summer

topics: Falling in love at a summer festival
A family table full of noise and warmth
The fire of an endless love

pop.guide: POP. Lyrics MUST be catchy and relatable. Themes: love, fun, empowerment, friendship, heartbreak.

characters: A confident person realizing their worth
A group of friends on a road trip
Someone obsessed with a new crush
Someone celebrating being newly single
settings: at a loud, colorful house party
driving with the windows down in summer
getting ready in front of a mirror
in the back of an Uber heading home alone
conflicts: the nervous excitement of a first date
walking away from a toxic relationship
feeling unstoppable on a perfect weekend
pretending to be fine when everything changed
objects_of_focus: a party cup left on the counter

topics: A crush that turned into something real
The best night that ended too soon
Choosing yourself for the first time
Starting over with a fresh playlist

classical.guide: CLASSICAL / CINEMATIC. Themes: the human journey, epic struggle, beauty of existence. Keep lyrics minimal and poetic.

characters: A tragic hero returning from battle
Two lovers separated by time
An explorer looking out at a new world
A ghost wandering ancient halls
settings: in a grand, candlelit ballroom
on a misty battlefield at dawn
inside a massive cathedral
on a cliff edge overlooking the ocean
conflicts: the overwhelming beauty of existence
a love that transcends centuries
the struggle between light and dark
creating something that outlasts time

topics: A journey with no certain end
The silence after the last note
A voice echoing through empty halls

anime.guide: ANIME / J-POP. Lyrics should feel emotional and adventurous. Themes: friendship, overcoming challenges, first love.

characters: A determined protagonist facing odds
Two rivals pushing each other
A loyal best friend offering support
A student experiencing first love
settings: on a high school rooftop at sunset
in the middle of a glowing battlefield
running through the rain on city streets
under a blooming cherry blossom tree
conflicts: protecting the innocent with everything left
unlocking hidden potential in despair
making an unbreakable promise
the bittersweet feeling of an adventure ending
objects_of_focus: a red ribbon tied around the wrist
a single star falling at the right moment

topics: A promise made before everything changed
A summer that ended but never left

soulful.guide: SOULFUL / FUNK. Lyrics MUST feel joyful and rhythmic. Themes: celebration, love, dancing, community.
soulful.vocal_style: Soulful belting, raspy warmth, backing harmonies

characters: A groovy uncle who is the life of the party
A couple married for 30 years
A community leader bringing people together
Someone shaking off the stress of work
settings: at a lively neighborhood block party
inside a spinning roller rink
on a lit-up disco dancefloor
at a summer cookout
conflicts: letting the music heal a broken spirit
celebrating love that grows stronger
refusing to let negativity ruin a day
unifying people through a shared groove
objects_of_focus: a pair of vintage roller skates

topics: A love that gets better with age
Community showing up when it matters

ambient.guide: AMBIENT. Lyrics (if any) must be minimal, mantra-like. Themes: inner peace, breath, stillness.

characters: A meditating monk in stillness
Someone floating aimlessly in calm water
A wanderer finding peace in the woods
An insomniac finding rest
settings: in a misty bamboo forest
on the shore of a dark ocean at night
sitting beside a trickling stream
on a mountain peak above the clouds
conflicts: releasing the need to control the future
finding stillness in a rushing world
focusing entirely on the breath
letting worries dissolve into silence

topics: Waking up before the world gets loud

christmas.guide: CHRISTMAS. Lyrics MUST feel warm and joyful. Themes: family, snow, giving, love during holidays.

characters: A child trying to stay awake for Santa
A family reuniting after a year
Someone traveling a long distance home
Two neighbors exchanging a gift
settings: in a cozy living room with a fireplace
walking through a town square in snow
looking out a frosted window
on a train heading home
conflicts: finding the true meaning of Christmas
the bittersweet feeling of missing someone
feeling the warmth of love on a cold night
creating new traditions
objects_of_focus: a glowing star on top of a tree
a warm mug of hot chocolate

topics: Coming home after a year away
The warmth of a crowded room
A small gift that meant everything

kids.guide: KIDS. Lyrics MUST be simple and fun. Themes: animals, colors, friendship, adventure, bedtime.

characters: A brave little puppy exploring
A friendly dinosaur who loves to dance
A curious child asking questions
A sleepy bear getting ready for winter
settings: in a magical playground
inside a cozy blanket fort
in a sunny meadow full of butterflies
underwater with talking sea creatures
conflicts: learning that making mistakes is okay
overcoming the fear of the dark
discovering how to share toys
finding the courage to try again
objects_of_focus: a night-light shaped like a moon

motivational.guide: MOTIVATIONAL. Lyrics MUST feel powerful and energizing. Themes: rising up, never giving up, inner strength.

characters: An athlete training before sunrise
An underdog who was told they would fail
Someone rising after hitting rock bottom
A survivor showing scars with pride
settings: in an empty gymnasium
looking in a locker room mirror
at the starting line of a race
at the bottom of a massive mountain
conflicts: pushing past the breaking point
turning fear and doubt into fuel
refusing to quit when things go wrong
winning the battle inside the mind

topics: The comeback no one saw coming
The version of you that refused to quit

afrobeats.guide: AFROBEATS. Lyrics MUST feel vibrant and celebratory. Themes: love, dancing, community, joy. Use repetitive rhythms.

characters: Two people falling in love at a festival
Someone dancing away the pain
A person celebrating their culture
A traveler reconnecting with roots
settings: on a sun-soaked Lagos rooftop
in the middle of a colorful street carnival
at a backyard party with a DJ
on a dusty dance floor in a local club
conflicts: choosing to celebrate instead of worrying
a love too big to keep quiet
finding home in a place far away
bridging two worlds together
objects_of_focus: a phone playing a favorite song

topics: A love the whole neighborhood knows
The joy of being exactly where you belong

dangdut_koplo.guide: DANGDUT KOPLO. Instrumen WAJIB: kendang koplo, gitar listrik, bass, keyboard. Tema: cinta, rindu, patah hati tapi tetap goyang. Lirik: Hindari bahasa kaku/puitis berlebihan agar natural.

characters: Perantau yang rindu kampung halaman
Orang patah hati yang pelampiasannya joget
Kekasih yang menunggu tanpa kepastian
Pedagang kaki lima yang bernyanyi malam hari
settings: di panggung dangdut pinggir jalan
di pasar malam yang penuh lampu
di balai desa saat hajatan
di atas bus malam yang melaju
conflicts: cinta yang terhalang restu atau harta
patah hati tapi harus tetap kerja keras
kerinduan pada kampung setelah lama merantau
ditinggal pas lagi sayang-sayangnya

campur_sari.guide: CAMPUR SARI. Perpaduan gamelan Jawa dan instrumen pop (gitar, keyboard). Lirik: Bahasa santai/sehari-hari. Jangan paksa AI pakai Krama Inggil agar lirik tetap mengalir dan logis. Tema: rindu, cinta.

characters: Pemuda yang merantau ke kota
Orang desa yang merindukan kekasihnya
Seseorang yang mengingat masa lalu
Pasangan yang berjanji setia
settings: di teras rumah saat hujan turun
di tepi sawah hijau waktu pagi
di stasiun kereta saat berpisah
di bawah pohon beringin alun-alun
conflicts: kerinduan yang sangat berat pada kampung
janji setia yang belum bisa ditepati
mengingat kenangan manis yang sudah berlalu
jarak kota dan desa yang memisahkan

langgam_jawa.guide: LANGGAM JAWA. Musik tradisional Jawa tenang. Instrumen: gamelan, kendang, suling. Gaya vokal: Sinden/lembut. Lirik: Bahasa Jawa sederhana yang puitis. Jangan minta aturan rima kompleks/macapat murni agar AI tidak menghasilkan teks yang tidak masuk akal.

characters: Seseorang yang merenungi kehidupan
Petani yang bersyukur atas panen
Ibu yang menidurkan anaknya
Orang tua yang memberikan nasihat
settings: di pendopo rumah yang sepi
di lereng gunung saat fajar
di tepi sungai yang mengalir tenang
di bawah langit malam berbintang
conflicts: mencari ketenangan batin di dunia yang sibuk
menerima takdir dengan ikhlas
rindu yang diungkapkan lewat doa
menjaga kesabaran dalam ujian hidup
